SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CLARK, RORY W SUBSTITUTED FOR DAVIS, III, SHEDRICK O. AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF THEODORE W BLOYD IN OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ] FILED BY DEFENDANT PUGLIESE, JOSEPH F.

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO AT LEAST HIS PERSONAL LIABILITY FOR THE DEBT AND AMOUNT OF RECOVERABLE DEBT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
